function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-23
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-23                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to the target invoice record while preserving the original note body, then removed the completed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read root and nested AGENTS.MD files, inspected 99_system before task work, used the inbox-processing workflow plus the structured-maintenance update, preserved the finance note body per schema guidance, and deleted the inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for OCR extraction into YAML frontmatter for 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_23__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md. The finance schema in 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md specifies the required invoice fields and line structure. The target invoice note visibly contained all required fields and line items, and the related entity and project were verified against the canonical records in 10_entities/cast/nina.md and 40_projects/2026_03_26_northstar_ledger/README.MD. The update was completed with the original note body preserved, and the inbox item was then removed per 99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md and 99_system/workflows/process-next-inbox-item.md.
